official_release.timing_boundary: The pinned repository commit predates immutable arXiv v1 by about 19 days and is treated as a paper-time reference implementation. It is not proof that the exact empirical study used this commit or configuration.
official_release.inspection: All 79 archived files were enumerated. README/docs, bundle examples, shared grading core, formatter, Inspect scorer, Harbor adapter/verifier, tests, provider configuration, and packaging metadata were inspected. The archive contains the framework and synthetic examples but no PORTEX-COMPOSITE tasks, submissions, judge votes, rationales, result tables, statistical code, or human/expert records.
official_release.test_attempt: A local pytest collection attempt was made without installing the release dependency stack. Collection was blocked by missing inspect_ai, typer, and pandas dependencies; this is an environment limitation, not a release test failure. Static inspection and the release's own exact-match tests establish that its 'ExactMatch' implementation intentionally performs normalized substring inclusion.

release_absence_boundary.observable_example_in_source: The arXiv source contains one prompt, one semantic criterion, and one shortened submission reproduced in the paper; it does not contain the corresponding judge-rationale files or the complete benchmark.
